vulnerability.title: Verify Permissions on passwd File
vulnerability.description: To properly set the permissions of /etc/passwd, run the command: $ sudo chmod 0644 /etc/passwd

triage_decision.reason: Changing /etc/passwd permissions to 0644 is a standard STIG hardening step that does not affect authentication mechanisms, boot process, or networking. It is low risk and aligns with the policy for safe file permission fixes.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: filesystems affected; Potential misconfiguration if incorrect mode is applied
